legacy.content:
# Phase 19-02 Summary
## Status
Completed.
## Delivered
1. Assistant Frame-compatible action bridge integrated in `/play`: - frame tools for status, legal actions, action dispatch, and cutscene dismissal. - synchronized feed/status updates after frame-dispatched turns. 2. Fallback behavior preserved: gameplay remains fully button-driven when frame host is absent. 3. Added frame/fallback validation tests in docs-site unit/e2e suites.
## Verification
- `pnpm --dir docs-site run test:unit` - `pnpm --dir docs-site run test:e2e`
